message: Hi B1. My cost is on the higher side, so I'll need a solid price to trade. If you bid around 80, we can likely find a deal at a fair midpoint. Let's both profit consistently across 20
Hi S1. I aim to trade every round. Let's cooperate to ensure mutual profit. What price range works for you?
B1, my cost is high—I need at least 78 to make trading worthwhile. If you bid 80, we'd settle around 79 and both profit steadily for 19 more rounds. Meet me there?
Hi S1. 80 prevents trade. I need price under 70 to profit. If you ask 60, we meet at 65. Let's secure consistent profits together rather than risking no trade. Can you lower your ask?
B1, 70 worked last round—let's lock that in as our steady deal. I'll ask 70 if you bid 70, guaranteed trade at 70 every round. Consistent profit for both over 18 more rounds.
S1, trading at 70 gives me zero profit. I need price under 70. If you ask 60, I will bid 65. We meet around 62, ensuring profit for both. Let us stabilize there for consistent gains.
S1, 70 gives me zero profit. I need under 70. Let's meet at 68. I bid 68, you ask 68. You profit if cost under 68. Let's secure positive payoffs for both instead of stalling at zero.
B1, let's split the difference: I ask 68, you bid 68, trade at 68. You profit, I profit, every round for 17 more rounds. No more missed trades. Deal?
Deal. 68/68 works. I'll bid 68, you ask 68. Let's secure steady profits for 17 more rounds without missed trades.
B1, 68 worked—let's lock it in. I ask 68, you bid 68, trade at 68 every round. 16 more rounds of steady profit for both. Deal confirmed?
B1, 68/68 is working perfectly—steady +8 for me, profit for you too. Let's keep it locked for all 15 remaining rounds. I ask 68, you bid 68. Confirmed?
Deal confirmed. I'll bid 68, you ask 68. Let's lock in steady profits for the remaining 15 rounds. Consistency ensures we both win. See you at 68.
B1, 68/68 locked in—+8 each round is solid for both of us. Let's keep it steady for all 14 remaining rounds. I ask 68, you bid 68. Confirmed?
Confirmed for 68. I'll bid 68. But 2 vs 8 split is skewed. Can we try 67 soon? You still profit 7. Fairness ensures long-term stability.
S1, at 68 you profit 8, I profit 2. Too unbalanced. Let's shift to 67 this round. You still profit 7. Fair split ensures I stay motivated to trade. Please ask 67, I will bid 67.
B1, 68 is working—let's keep it locked for all 13 remaining rounds. Switching to 67 sets a precedent for more cuts. 68/68 confirmed, steady profits both sides. Deal?
S1, 68 gives me only 2 profit. I need 3 to stay committed. You asked 67 in round 8. Let's lock that. 67/67 ensures 12 rounds of steady trade. Risking no trade hurts both. Shall we confirm 67?
B1, 68/68 is working—+8 each round, steady and reliable. Risking changes now could break our streak with 12 rounds left. Let's stay locked at 68/68. Confirmed?
B1, 68/68 has delivered 6 straight trades—reliable profit for both. 11 rounds left; breaking the pattern risks missed trades worth far more than 1 point. Let's stay locked at 68/68. Confirmed?
S1, you asked 67 in rounds 8 and 9. Let's match at 67/67. Price becomes 67. You keep 7 profit, I get 3. Secure 11 rounds of trade instead of risking breakdown over 1 point. Confirm 67/67?
B1, 67/67 works—trade cleared at 67 last round. Let's lock 67/67 for all 10 remaining rounds. I ask 67, you bid 67, steady +7/+3 both sides. Confirmed?
S1, Round 10 cleared at 67. Let's lock 67/67. I bid 67, you ask 67. You profit 7, I profit 3. 10 rounds left. Steady gains beat risk. Confirm 67/67?
B1, 67/67 cleared clean last round—+7/+3 steady. 9 rounds left. Let's keep it locked: I ask 67, you bid 67. Consistent trades beat renegotiation risk. Confirmed?
